memberdef.name: dataIndex

detaileddescription.para: Returns data index, for now typecast to unsigned int.

memberdef.referencedby: SrcFinfo5< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 >::send
SrcFinfo6< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6 >::send

memberdef.name: element
memberdef.referencedby: SrcFinfo5< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 >::send
SrcFinfo6< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6 >::send

memberdef.argsstring: (Element *e, unsigned int index, unsigned int field=0)
memberdef.name: Eref
memberdef.referencedby: SrcFinfo5< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 >::send
SrcFinfo6< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6 >::send

detaileddescription.para: Returns field index, for now typecast to unsigned int. This is really an extra bit of baggage used here not for immediate lookup, but to pass to EpFuncs that know how to use this for lookup.
Returns node upon which specified data entry resides . If this is a GlobalElement then it returns the local node.
Returns the Id corresponding to the Eref. Loses information.
True if the data are on the current node

memberdef.name: msgDigest

detaileddescription.para: Returns the digested version of the specified msgsrc. If the message has changed, this call triggers the digestion operation.

memberdef.referencedby: SrcFinfo5< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 >::send
SrcFinfo6< T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6 >::send

detaileddescription.para: Returns the ObjId corresponding to the Eref. All info is kept.
